test_cmd: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run build

tasks.description: Foundational token remap in src/app.css: swap the Lora @import for the IBM Plex superfamily, remap the :root (light) and .dark (dark) shadcn token blocks onto the Evan Harley Design System (Deep Emerald accent, warm-charcoal/warm-paper neutrals, chart + sidebar tokens), set --radius to 0.5rem for restrained radii, set body to IBM Plex Sans, and add font-sans/serif/mono tokens to @theme inline. Propagates to all components via existing semantic utilities.

Make dark the default theme by setting <ModeWatcher defaultMode="dark" /> in the layout (after verifying the prop name against the installed mode-watcher types). Toggle and persistence remain unchanged.

Per-section brand audit: grep components for token-bypassing literals (Lora, raw hex, rose/pink, font-serif/mono, non-token radii), confirm everything resolves to the remapped tokens, verify/soften the HeroSection radial-gradient so it reads as a single soft emerald glow, and confirm the ui/ primitives (button, card, badge) carry no hardcoded brand values (touch only if a finding requires it).

Browser verification pass with the dogfood skill (agent-browser) against the design-system reference: verify fonts, accent, neutrals, and radii in both the dark (default) and light themes, confirm the toggle persists and dark is the first-load default, watch for layout/contrast/reduced-motion regressions, and record findings. Fix any defects at the source token/component and re-run the static gate.

test_cases.maps_to_criterion: AC1 — Lora removed; IBM Plex imported; body renders IBM Plex Sans
test_cases.description: In-browser computed body font-family resolves to IBM Plex Sans and no Lora @import or usage remains anywhere.

test_cases.maps_to_criterion: AC2 — accent is Deep Emerald, no rose remains
test_cases.description: Buttons, focus ring, links, and hero glow render Deep Emerald #1FA37A on dark / #157A57 on light; no rose/pink anywhere.
Dark background is warm charcoal #0E0F11 (not pure black/zinc) with warm off-white #F5F3EF text; light uses warm paper #FAF8F4.
Controls render ~5-6px radius and cards 12px; nothing is sharp-0 or pill-round for cards.

test_cases.maps_to_criterion: AC5 — dark default + working, persistent light toggle
test_cases.description: First load is dark even on a light-mode OS; toggling switches to a brand-aligned light theme and the choice persists across reload.

test_cases.maps_to_criterion: AC6 — no token-bypassing literals in any component
test_cases.description: Grep across components/routes finds no Lora, raw brand hex, rose/pink, or non-token radii that conflict with the design system.
A dogfood/agent-browser pass confirms accent, fonts, neutrals, and radii visually match the design-system reference in both themes, with findings recorded.
npm run check (svelte-check), npm run lint (prettier + eslint), and npm run build all succeed.

security_concerns: Pure front-end styling change: no auth, no user data, no endpoints, no new data flows; BOLA/IDOR not applicable.
Only external surface is the Google Fonts CDN @import, identical trust profile to the existing Lora import; no secrets, server code, or injection surface introduced.
